content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_ldw
GO
/*
    Se requiere obtener el número de vehículos por tipo "vehículos eléctricos de batería (BEV)" y
    los "vehículos híbridos enchufables (PHEV)" 
    registrados por "marca(make)" en una "año" y "mes" en específicio
*/
/*
SELECT c.year, c.month, 
    v.make, 
    vt.electric_vehicle_type,
    COUNT(1) AS vehicle_register_count
FROM
silver.vw_vehicle_registration vr
INNER JOIN silver.vehicle v ON (vr.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id)
INNER JOIN silver.vehicle_type vt ON (vt.vehicle_type = v.vehiche_type_id)
INNER JOIN silver.calendar c ON (CAST(vr.registration_date AS DATE) = c.date)
WHERE c.year = '2024' AND c.month = '06'
GROUP BY c.year, c.month, v.make, vt.electric_vehicle_type
*/
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '01' GO


EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '02' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '03' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '04' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '05' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '06' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '07' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '08' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '09' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '10' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '11' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2024', '12' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2025', '01' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2025', '02' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2025', '03' GO
EXEC gold.usp_golden_quantity_of_vehicle_by_type '2025', '04' GO
